{{Infobox concept
| name = gold light (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = City of Light
}}

''See also: [[gold light (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gold]] [[Light]] is a sentient and powerful force that exists within the mind of an individual. It possesses a distinct personality, capable of laughing, offering advice, and expressing approval or grim sensations that transcend spoken language. It acts as a mentor or internal guide, encouraging bravery and urging the individual to embrace their true nature rather than clinging to their former identity as a [[Traveler]]. Physically, the light can manifest as an intense, blinding blast with enough kinetic force to shatter objects, displace debris, and cause fire. While it can provide a sense of comfort similar to a hidden sun, its presence is also associated with complex emotions such as dark humor or bleak secrets.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The gold light is a type of [[madra]] residing within [[Alin]] that he can manifest to fill his hands with a shining glow. This internal light possesses its own consciousness, capable of asking [[Alin]] questions or raging at him with a voice. Beyond communication, the light serves as a source of destructive power that [[Alin]] can summon to his palms, shape into a golden blade, or hurl as energetic blasts. During moments of intense emotion, the light has cried out for victory within [[Alin]]'s heart and berated him for allowing others to escape. Ultimately, [[Alin]] remains prepared to unleash this power when necessary.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can fill his hand with shining golden light.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gold]] [[Light]] can ask questions to [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gold]] [[Light]] is a type of light within [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can summon [[Gold]] [[Light]] to fill his palms with destructive power.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gold]] [[Light]] can be used to create a golden blade.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Gold]] [[Light]] can be hurled as blasts.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gold]] [[Light]] is a [[madra]] [[Alin]] can use.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gold]] [[Light]] is a voice that can rage at [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gold]] [[Light]] told [[Alin]] he let them get away!<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Gold]] [[Light]] cried out for victory in [[Alin]]'s heart.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] was prepared to unleash [[Gold]] [[Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
